uk: Свв. апостолів Ераста, Олімпа, Родіона і тих, що з ними.
saints.en: Sts. Apostles Erastus, Olympas, Rhodion, and those with them

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир: 3 Октоїха, 3 апп., Сл., І нині: богород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар апп., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря апп. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. апп.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар апп. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря апп. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і апп. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний апп., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар апп., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря апп. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. апп.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – апп.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – 2 Сол. 274 зач.; 1, 10 – 2, 2. Єв. – Лк. 68 зач.; 12, 42-48.

troparion_en.text: Holy Apostles, Erastus, Olympas, Herodion, Sosipater, Quartus and Tertius, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.

kontakion_en.text: Illumined by divine light, O holy apostles, / you wisely destroyed the works of idolatry. / When you caught all the pagans you brought them to the Master / and taught them to glorify the Trinity.

matched_oca_saint: Apostles of the Seventy: Erastus, Olympas, Herodion, Sosipater, Quartus, and Tertius

oca_saints.name: Apostles of the Seventy: Erastus, Olympas, Herodion, Sosipater, Quartus, and Tertius

troparion.text: Holy Apostles, Erastus, Olympas, Herodion, Sosipater, Quartus and Tertius, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.

kontakion.text: Illumined by divine light, O holy apostles, / you wisely destroyed the works of idolatry. / When you caught all the pagans you brought them to the Master / and taught them to glorify the Trinity.

troparion.text: (Podoben: “When the stone had been sealed ...”) You confessed Christ, O prize winner, /  and humbled the madness of the impious idolators,  / and became a partaker of glory by enduring the contest of martyrdom;  / for this reason, we honor you, Orestes, as one victorious, and we cry out to you:  / "Glory to Him Who has given you strength.  / Glory to Him Who has given you a crown.  / Glory to Him Who, through you, works healing for all.

kontakion.text: Undefeated in your contest, O Martyr Orestes,  / you were accepted and rewarded by Christ, the bestower of prizes; /  and He has granted you the crown of life and the divine power to work healings,  / for He is the only Lover of mankind.

oca_saints.name: Hieromartyr Mίlos (or Milēs) the Wonderworker, and two disciples

troparion.text: O God of our Fathers,  /  always act with kindness towards us;  /  take not Your mercy from us,  /  but guide our lives in peace  /  through the prayers of the hieromartyrs Milles, Euores, and Seboes.

kontakion.text: (Podoben: “As the first fruits...”) The Church glorifies you as teachers of virtue and adornments of hierarchs,  / singing: “By your intercessions for those who lovingly honor you, /  grant progress in virtue, and deliverance from temptations.”

oca_saints.name: Venerable Theocteristus, Abbot of Symbola on Mount Olympus, Bithynia

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Theocteristus, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

Your holy martyr Constantine, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Constantine;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

oca_saints.name: Martyrdom of the Great-martyr George of Georgia

troparion.text: Your holy martyr George, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!
